examples: Of your two wives, Dispassion and Worldliness.
And when one renounces the world one is caught in worldliness.
He was the embodiment of the Master's ideal of life in the world, unstained by worldliness.
When he returned to Assisi, a spiritual change commenced, and Francis abandoned his worldliness.
Worshippers who were left at sea by such other-worldliness also faced more mundane problems.
